mission.title: rook: rgw: implement support for authentication using keystone for s3 and swift
mission.description:
This PR implements the authentication using keystone of swift and s3 as described in the already existing design document [swift-and-keystone-integration](https://github.com/rook/rook/blob/459604a3bd383ded82d62463b963f19869331216/design/ceph/object/swift-and-keystone-integration.md) (see https://github.com/rook/rook/pull/9444 for the design request and https://github.com/rook/rook/issues/9088 for the general issue).

The design document describes another feature namely using k8s custom resources to create swift sub-users which will be implemented in a another PR.

Resolves #9088

resolution.summary:
This PR implements using k8s custom resources to create swift sub-users as described in the already existing design document [swift-and-keystone-integration](https://github.com/rook/rook/blob/459604a3bd383ded82d62463b963f19869331216/design/ceph/object/swift-and-keystone-integration.md) (see https://github.com/rook/rook/pull/9444 for the design request and https://github.com/rook/rook/issues/9088 for the general issue).
                                                                                
The design document describes another feature namely the authentication using keystone of swift and s3 which is implemented in a #13807.

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
